full_text:
Hao Zhao (Bodao) 郝昭 (伯道)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hao Zhao (郝昭), styledBodao (伯道), was born in Taiyuan. A talented officer of Wei. Successfully defended against Zhuge Liang at Chencang. Hao Zhao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
